title: Maname Maname Lyrics Vanmham Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Maname Maname
Singer(s): Suchith Suresan, A.V.Pooja
Music: Thaman.S
Lyricist: Yugabharathi
Movie: Vanmham (2014)

Maname Maname
ariya maname, enna aanadho unakku.
Sariyo thavaro
theriya maname sollu vedhanai edharkku.

Kanavaana vazhvai
nee kalaiyaamal kettaayo.
Uravaadum neraththil
undaindhethaan ponaayo.

Edhanaale sedhangal
puriyaamal nindraayo.
Vidhiyaadum aattaththai
vilaipesa vandhaayo

Karaiseraa odam neeyo
dhisai maari pogindraayo.
maname ....

varundhaadhey neeyum veeney
valiyaavum theerum thaaney.

Maname Maname
ariya maname, enna aanadho unakku.
Sariyo thavaro
theriya maname sollu vedhanai edharkku.

Thavaraana sollaaley
thadamaari nindromey
urave illai thaniyaanomey.

vazhiserum munnaale
idam maari sendromey
vidaiye illai pudhir aanomey.

Seiyum thavarum sariyaai
aaga koodum adhupol
seigindra anbil kaayam aarippogumey.

Mazhai megam thoorum podhu
thadai podum boomi yedhu
manamey.

Pugai pole thaaneey sogam
pani poley neengi pogum.

Maname Maname
ariya maname, enna aanadho unakku.
Sariyo thavaro
theriya maname sollu vedhanai edharkku.

Eriyaamal theeyillai
udhiraamal poovillai
thuyare illaa manam ingillai.

Silaneram manmeley
malarkooda mulll poley
theriyum ingae adhuthan thollai.

unmai adhani arindhaal
vanmham yedhu yedhuvum
kaiyyil illai kaalam podum kolamey.

Karaiseraa odam neeyo
dhisai maari pogindraayo.
maname ....

varundhaadhey neeyum veeney
valiyaavum theerum thaaney.

Maname Maname
ariya maname, enna aanadho unakku.
Sariyo thavaro
theriya maname sollu vedhanai edharkku.

Kanavaana vazhvai
nee kalaiyaamal kettaayo.
Uravaadum neraththil
undaindhethaan ponaayo.

Edhanaale sedhangal
puriyaamal nindraayo.
Vidhiyaadum aattaththai
vilaipesa vandhaayo

Karaiseraa odam neeyo
dhisai maari pogindraayo.
maname ....

varundhaadhey neeyum veeney
valiyaavum theerum thaaney.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Vanmham, the song Maname Maname beautifully encapsulates the feelings of love and introspection. The lyrics delve into the complexities of relationships, expressing both joy and sorrow. As the characters navigate their emotions, the song serves as a poignant reminder of the power of connection. With its soothing melody and heartfelt delivery, it evokes a sense of nostalgia and longing.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Maname Maname from Vanmham is a beautifully crafted duet that captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of AV Pooja and Suchith Suresan, this song resonates with deep emotions and heartfelt lyrics. The collaboration with music director Thaman S adds a unique flavor, making it a must-listen for romantic souls.
stanzaMeanings: O mind, O mind, know what is happening to you. Is it right or wrong? O mind, tell me why you are in pain.
Have you heard the life that is like a dream? Did the bond break at the right time?
You are standing still without understanding the reasons. Did the fate come to reveal the game?
You are the one who is changing direction. O mind....
Don't worry, you will also find a way to escape.
O mind, O mind, know what is happening to you. Is it right or wrong? O mind, tell me why you are in pain.
If we speak wrongly, we will stand apart; there is no bond, we are alone.
We have changed places from where we used to live; there is no seed left, we have become a mystery.
Mistakes will come together correctly, just like love will grow.
When the rain clouds gather, the earth will be covered, O mind.
Like a flame, you will leave like the mist.
O mind, O mind, know what is happening to you. Is it right or wrong? O mind, tell me why you are in pain.
There is no fire without a flame, and there are no flowers without a bud; there is no sorrow here.
Sometimes, O mind, you will know like a thorn in a flower, that is the only way to understand.
If you know the truth, there is nothing in hand; time will be a game.
You are the one who is changing direction. O mind....
Don't worry, you will also find a way to escape.
O mind, O mind, know what is happening to you. Is it right or wrong? O mind, tell me why you are in pain.
Have you heard the life that is like a dream? Did the bond break at the right time?
You are standing still without understanding the reasons. Did the fate come to reveal the game?
You are the one who is changing direction. O mind....
Don't worry, you will also find a way to escape.
